title: Xvelvety Adventurous Spicy Mung Bean Sprout Wrap
description: A unique blend of mung bean sprouts, agemono-deep-fry techniques, and a dash of adventurous flavors to create a Buddhist temple-friendly snack that is both spicy and velvety.
instructions: Combine ground pork, crushed red pepper flakes, soy sauce, sesame oil, minced garlic, and salt in a bowl.
Add chopped scallions to the mixture.
Divide the mixture into four portions and shape them into small balls or patties.
Heat enough vegetable oil for deep-fry at 180 degrees Celsius (356 Fahrenheit).
Deep fry the patty pieces until golden brown, about 2-3 minutes per side.
Remove from heat and let it rest on a paper towel-lined plate to drain excess oil.
Slice each mung bean sprout into thin rounds.
Place one sliced mung bean sprout round in each wrap. Place a deep-fried patty piece inside the wrap, top with more scallions if desired.
